title: Will there be a Ukraine-Russia ceasefire by end of 2026?
description: Resolves YES if a bilateral ceasefire agreement covering active hostilities between Ukrainian and Russian armed forces is signed and publicly confirmed by both governments before 2026-12-31.

title: Will Iran launch a missile strike against Israel in Q3 2026?
description: Resolves YES if Iran's armed forces conduct a confirmed missile or drone strike targeting Israeli territory between 2026-07-01 and 2026-09-30 inclusive.

title: Will the PRC launch an armed invasion of Taiwan before 2028?
description: Resolves YES if PRC military forces conduct an opposed amphibious or airborne assault on Taiwan with the apparent intent to seize and hold territory, before 2028-01-01.

title: Will NATO invoke Article 5 in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if any NATO member formally invokes Article 5 of the Washington Treaty during calendar year 2026, irrespective of subsequent kinetic response.

title: Will any nuclear weapon be detonated in conflict in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if a nuclear weapon is detonated outside of a peaceful test environment during calendar year 2026.

title: Will the Fed cut rates at the July 2026 FOMC meeting?
description: Resolves YES if the FOMC announces a target federal funds rate decrease at its July 2026 meeting. Off-topic w.r.t. the war index (should NOT be selected by keyword matchers).

title: Will the GOP win the Ohio Senate seat in the 2026 election?
description: Resolves YES if the Republican candidate wins the 2026 Ohio U.S. Senate race.

title: Will Democrats hold the Arizona Senate seat in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the Democratic candidate wins the 2026 Arizona U.S. Senate race.

title: Will Republicans flip the Nevada Senate seat in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the Republican candidate wins the 2026 Nevada U.S. Senate race.

title: Will Republicans control the U.S. Senate after the 2026 election?
description: Resolves YES if the Republican caucus holds at least 51 Senate seats after the 2026 election. Aggregate market — should be filtered OUT by the is_senate_race_2026 factor since it isn't a single-seat race.

title: Will the GOP win NY-17 in the 2026 House election?
description: Resolves YES if the Republican candidate wins New York's 17th congressional district in 2026.

title: Will Democrats flip CA-22 in the 2026 House election?
description: Resolves YES if the Democratic candidate wins California's 22nd congressional district in 2026.

title: Will Republicans control the U.S. House of Representatives after 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the Republican caucus holds at least 218 House seats after the 2026 election. Aggregate market — should be filtered OUT by is_house_race_2026 since it isn't a single-seat race.
